'''jowakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:loamy|loamy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loamy|loamy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jowakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jowakithi|jowakithi]] || [[word:jowakiji|jowakiji]] || [[word:jowakishi|jowakishi]] || [[word:jowakiki|jowakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jowakuthuthu|jowakuthuthu]] || [[word:jowakujuju|jowakujuju]] || [[word:jowakushushu|jowakushushu]] || [[word:jowakukuku|jowakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jowakuthu|jowakuthu]] || [[word:jowakuju|jowakuju]] || [[word:jowakushu|jowakushu]] || [[word:jowakuku|jowakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jowakufthuf|jowakufthuf]] || [[word:jowakufjuf|jowakufjuf]] || [[word:jowakufshuf|jowakufshuf]] || [[word:jowakufkuf|jowakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jowakethe|jowakethe]] || [[word:jowakeje|jowakeje]] || [[word:jowakeshe|jowakeshe]] || [[word:jowakeke|jowakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jowakothotho|jowakothotho]] || [[word:jowakojojo|jowakojojo]] || [[word:jowakoshosho|jowakoshosho]] || [[word:jowakokoko|jowakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jowakotho|jowakotho]] || [[word:jowakojo|jowakojo]] || [[word:jowakosho|jowakosho]] || [[word:jowakoko|jowakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jowakofthof|jowakofthof]] || [[word:jowakofjof|jowakofjof]] || [[word:jowakofshof|jowakofshof]] || [[word:jowakofkof|jowakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfthÃŸf|jowakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfjÃŸf|jowakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfshÃŸf|jowakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfkÃŸf|jowakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|jowakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|jowakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|jowakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|jowakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfthÃŸf|jowakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfjÃŸf|jowakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfshÃŸf|jowakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfkÃŸf|jowakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfthÃŸf|jowakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfjÃŸf|jowakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfshÃŸf|jowakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jowakÃŸfkÃŸf|jowakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jowakÃḊthÃḊ|jowakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:jowakÃḊjÃḊ|jowakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:jowakÃḊshÃḊ|jowakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:jowakÃḊkÃḊ|jowakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jowakathatha|jowakathatha]] || [[word:jowakajaja|jowakajaja]] || [[word:jowakashasha|jowakashasha]] || [[word:jowakakaka|jowakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jowakatha|jowakatha]] || [[word:jowakaja|jowakaja]] || [[word:jowakasha|jowakasha]] || [[word:jowakaka|jowakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jowakafthaf|jowakafthaf]] || [[word:jowakafjaf|jowakafjaf]] || [[word:jowakafshaf|jowakafshaf]] || [[word:jowakafkaf|jowakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jowakasha|jowakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jowakshÃḋsha|jowakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jowakrosha|jowakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jowakmusha|jowakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jowakyasha|jowakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojowaknkshÃḋsha|gojowaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojowaknkrosha|gojowaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojowaknkmusha|gojowaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojowaknkyasha|gojowaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jowawakasha|jowawakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jowawakshÃḋsha|jowawakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jowawakrosha|jowawakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jowawakmusha|jowawakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jowawakyasha|jowawakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojowawaknkshÃḋsha|gojowawaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojowawaknkrosha|gojowawaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojowawaknkmusha|gojowawaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojowawaknkyasha|gojowawaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jewÃḊkasha|jewÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jewÃḊkshÃḋsha|jewÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jewÃḊkrosha|jewÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jewÃḊkmusha|jewÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jewÃḊkyasha|jewÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojewÃḊknkshÃḋsha|gojewÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojewÃḊknkrosha|gojewÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojewÃḊknkmusha|gojewÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojewÃḊknkyasha|gojewÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jowfakasha|jowfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jowfakshÃḋsha|jowfakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jowfakrosha|jowfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jowfakmusha|jowfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jowfakyasha|jowfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojowfaknkshÃḋsha|gojowfaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojowfaknkrosha|gojowfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojowfaknkmusha|gojowfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojowfaknkyasha|gojowfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
